profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk, through its subsidiaries, operates LPG fuel filling and transport stations. It engages in power generation; industrial services; and trade services. PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk was formerly known as PT HD Capital Tbk and changed its name to PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk in March 2018. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Semarang, Indonesia.
